channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sam Mitchell defends Hawthorn medical staff after Nick Watson undergoes HIA following heavy head knock
item.description: Hawthorn coach Sam Mitchell has expressed full confidence in his club’s medical team after dynamic forward Nick Watson was involved in a heavy collision during their AFL match against Adelaide in Laun...

item.title: Leonie Vernet: Celebrating the Legacy of a French Fashion Icon
item.description: Leonie Vernet (1934–1993) was a defining figure in mid-20th century French fashion, renowned for her elegant presence and chiseled features. As a model for prestigious designers such as Givenchy and B...

item.title: Aliko Dangote Plans IPO for Refinery, Considers Mombasa or Lamu for East Africa Expansion
item.description: Aliko Dangote, Africa's wealthiest industrialist, has revealed plans to list a 10% stake of the Dangote Refinery through an initial public offering (IPO) scheduled for September 2026. The announcement...

item.title: KZN family demands answers after reserved grave next to father's plot allegedly allocated to another person
item.description: A Durban family is deeply saddened and frustrated after learning that a gravesite they reserved years ago at Lalakahle Memorial Park in Botha’s Hill was apparently given to someone else without their ...

item.title: Atlantic Hurricane Season Forecasted Below Average in 2026 Due to El Niño
item.description: The 2026 Atlantic hurricane season is predicted to be quieter than usual, largely due to the development of an El Niño event, according to forecasts from the U.S. National Hurricane Center (NHC) and t...

item.title: How Thoughtful Design Makes Lagos Spaces Comfortable and Inviting
item.description: For Lagos, some restaurants, hotels, and offices dey always feel better than ordinary. People fit spend time for there without really knowing why, whether na for chop, stay, or work. Di secret be say ...

item.title: GOP Senators Express Strong Opposition to Trump's $1.7 Billion Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: A closed-door meeting between Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche and Senate Republicans on Thursday became highly contentious, centering on former President Donald Trump's proposed $1.7 billion...

item.title: Prolonged power outages in Garden Route due to repeated cable theft
item.description: Residents along the Garden Route are facing severe disruption as they enter their 16th consecutive day without consistent electricity and water supply, primarily due to ongoing cable theft. The outage...

item.title: Global oil prices fall as China cuts imports and U.S. boosts exports
item.description: Despite fears of skyrocketing oil prices due to the ongoing U.S.-Iran conflict and closure of the Strait of Hormuz, global crude prices have actually declined to around US$100–US$110 per barrel from t...

item.title: Obafemi Hamzat Emerges APC Lagos Governorship Candidate for 2027 Election
item.description: Governor Babajide Sanwo-Olu of Lagos State hail the impressive turnout of party members during the All Progressives Congress (APC) governorship primary election wey hold across the state on Thursday. ...

item.title: Ruan Nortje to play 150th match for Bulls in URC quarter-final against Munster
item.description: Bulls captain Ruan Nortje will reach a significant career milestone when he runs out for his 150th appearance for the Pretoria franchise in next weekend’s United Rugby Championship quarter-final again...

item.title: Former Cuban President Raúl Castro Faces Murder Charges Over 1996 Plane Shootdown
item.description: The United States has formally indicted Cuba's former leader, Raúl Castro, over the 1996 shooting down of two civilian aircraft operated by anti-Castro pilots. At 94 years old, Castro faces charges in...

item.title: Andy Burnham launches bid for Makerfield byelection while positioning himself as future national Labour leader
item.description: In a satirical sketch, Guardian columnist John Crace portrays Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham as a messianic figure launching a campaign for the Makerfield byelection. The piece mocks Burnham’s ...

item.title: South African Government Announces Plans to Fight Misinformation and Require AI Content Labelling
item.description: Minister in The Presidency Khumbudzo Ntshavheni has tabled the GCIS Budget Vote in Parliament and outlined several measures to tackle misinformation, disinformation, and malinformation in South Africa...

item.title: Justice Minister Defends Anti-Terror and Hate Symbols Bill, Emphasizing Protections for Legitimate Protests
item.description: OTTAWA — Justice Minister Sean Fraser appeared before the Senate committee on human rights to discuss Bill C-9, which aims to introduce new criminal penalties for impeding or intimidating access to bu...

item.title: Lamido Urges Northern Leaders to Address Insecurity Through Moral Reform and State Police
item.description: Former Jigawa State Governor, Sule Lamido, don yarn say the North need to put their matter for order if dem wan stop the wahala of insecurity. For interview with Premier Radio, Kano, Lamido talk say b...

item.title: 16-Year-Old Boy Arrested in Nakuru for the Murder of 12-Year-Old Mercy Nyambura
item.description: Police in Njoro, Nakuru County have arrested a 16-year-old boy suspected of killing 12-year-old Mercy Nyambura, a Grade 6 pupil. The young girl was found dead inside a maize plantation hours after her...

item.title: Blind mother independently operates maize mill to support her family
item.description: A video of an elderly blind mother working at a maize mill has gone viral in Kenya, inspiring admiration and sympathy from netizens. Despite her disability, she performs her work independently without...

item.title: US expresses readiness to supply energy to India during upcoming visit
item.description: Ahead of his visit to India from May 23 to May 26, US Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated that the United States is prepared to sell as much energy as India wishes to procure. Addressing reporters i...

item.title: Tanzanian Women Golfers Excel at Kenya Amateur Championship
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Tanzanian women golfers made strong impression at the 2026 Kenya Ladies Amateur Strokeplay Championship held at Limuru Country Club. Neema Olomi of Arusha Gymkhana Club led the charge,...
